name: Structural — Chat History Data Integrity
summary: All chat history and session management features work correctly. Messages persist accurately across selection, planning, and companion modes. Session listing returns correct data with valid timestamps. Cross-session isolation is fully maintained — no message bleed detected.

steps.name: Phase 1: Selection Mode — Create Trip via Chat

details.action: SendMessage(mode=CHAT_MODE_SELECTION, content='I want to plan a trip to Portugal for 10 days.')

session_created.note: sessionCreated event emitted with valid UUID

trip_created.note: AI called create_trip tool, trip created with title 'Portugal 10 Days'

message_complete.note: Full response received with non-empty content

steps.name: Phase 2: Planning Mode — Message A (itinerary request)

details.action: SendMessage(mode=CHAT_MODE_PLANNING, trip_id=..., content='I want to visit Lisbon and Porto. Can you suggest a rough itinerary?')

session_created.note: New planning session created with valid UUID

itinerary_created.note: AI proactively called create_itinerary_items with 21 items across 10 days

steps.name: Phase 2: Planning Mode — Message B (add to itinerary)

details.action: SendMessage(mode=CHAT_MODE_PLANNING, trip_id=..., session_id=..., content='Add those to my itinerary please.')

message_complete.note: AI correctly recognized items were already saved, did not duplicate

details.action: SendMessage(mode=CHAT_MODE_COMPANION, trip_id=..., content='I just arrived in Lisbon. Where should I eat dinner tonight near Alfama?')
details.prerequisites: Trip status updated to TRIP_STATUS_ACTIVE before sending companion message

session_created.note: New companion session created with valid UUID

nearby_places_attempted.note: AI attempted nearby_places tool (returned no_location as expected without location data)

message_complete.note: AI provided restaurant recommendations near Alfama

timestamps_valid.note: All sessions have createdAt and lastMessageAt, lastMessageAt >= createdAt

timestamp_field_name.note: API uses 'lastMessageAt' rather than 'updatedAt' — functionally equivalent for session tracking

first_user_contains_portugal.content_snippet: I want to plan a trip to Portugal for 10 days.

user_msg_contains_lisbon_porto.content_snippet: I want to visit Lisbon and Porto. Can you suggest a rough itinerary?

user_msg_contains_itinerary.content_snippet: Add those to my itinerary please.

user_msg_contains_alfama.content_snippet: I just arrived in Lisbon. Where should I eat dinner tonight near Alfama?

details.action: Verify no message IDs or content from one session appear in another session's history

selection_isolated.note: Selection session has 2 messages, all with session_id 6d054964-...

planning_isolated.note: Planning session has 4 messages, all with session_id b4a28603-...

companion_isolated.note: Companion session has 2 messages, all with session_id a03f2b89-...

no_message_bleed.note: No message IDs appear in multiple sessions. Content is distinct per session.

warnings.description: Planning session second assistant response starts with 'I'm your travel planning assistant' which reads like a system prompt identity leak. This is cosmetic but slightly odd in a multi-turn conversation.

Planning assistant response references internal tool result metadata ('you can see the tool returned created_count: 21') which exposes implementation details to the user. The user should not see raw tool result references.

usefulness_scores.note: N/A for structural test — this persona tests data integrity, not AI quality
